raw_transcript: We checked your ANA and Smooth Muscle Antibodies, which were both positive. But the gold standard is a liver biopsy. I’m going to have the radiologist perform a needle biopsy to look for 'interface hepatitis.'
final_corrected_note: We checked your ANA and Smooth Muscle Antibodies, which were both positive. But the gold standard is a liver biopsy. I’m going to have the radiologist perform a needle biopsy to look for 'interface hepatitis.'
